title: Hoikwo 12oz / 380ml Coffee Mugs Set of 6, White Bone China Mugs with Relief Pattern for Coffee, Tea, Latte, Milk, Cocoa, Juice and Other Hot Drinks
features: 【Chic Design】: Elevate your coffee ritual with our white tea cups set of 6, each featuring a unique embossed design including wave, diamond, fish scale, hexagon, cross-flower, and white dot patterns.
【Easy to Clean】: Coffee cup is microwave safe and dishwasher safe. The smooth interior makes cleaning easier as it is less prone to coffee stains.

【Versatile Use】: Whether it's morning coffee, hot milk, cocoa or tea, these stylish mug set are an excellent choice. The sturdy handles and modern look make these mugs both practical and suitable for any kitchen style.
【Generous Capacity】: Each coffee mug holds 13 ounces (380 ml) of your favourite warm beverage, ideal for a satisfying cup of coffee, tea, hot chocolate, or milk.

【Perfect Gift】: Ideal for Christmas, housewarmings, or any special affair, the bone china mug is a splendid pick for wives, mums, kin, friends, or any kitchenware enthusiast, fitting for use at home, in the office, hotels, and eateries.
description: Product Description Hoikwo Drinking Cup Makes A Great Gift With its fancy design and high quality, this exquisite coffee mug is undoubtedly the perfect gift for housewarming, celebrations or for friends and relatives. It is not only practical, but also a bearer of good feelings. Perfect Sizes and Designs Ceramic Coffee Mugs Each mug has a unique textured design including white dots, hexagonal, cross, fish scale, diamond and water ripple, each texture is exquisite and unique to add an artistic touch to your table.The 6 different embossed patterns ensure your family won't get the mugs mixed up. More Affordable Coffee Mug Set of 6 Beautifully packaged in a classic white embossed design, this set of drinking cup complements a variety of interior styles. The mugs have a larger capacity than traditional coffee cups and a comfortable handle, making them perfect for tea, coffee or hot chocolate. A must try if you are looking to purchase mugs！ 6 Different Embossed Patterns This set of 380ml ceramic mugs is beautifully designed and the perfect size. 6 different embossed patterns ensure that your family won't mix up the mugs.
